description_long: This object is a rectangular, hard-sided toolbox with a predominantly gray color scheme and black geometric accents. The surface appears smooth and solid, with a matte finish and minimal visible texture. The top face features a distinctive black border and two small oval shapes, likely representing latches or fasteners, while the front face has a bold, angular black line that may indicate a seam or opening. The sides are plain, with the left side showing a partial black line and the right side being mostly unadorned. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for storing and transporting tools in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or construction sites.
description: A rectangular, gray toolbox with black geometric accents and a smooth, matte surface. Features subtle latch details and a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The front face shows a bold black angular line and a partial black border, with a smooth gray surface.
description_view_1: The left side displays the black angular line wrapping around and two small oval shapes, likely latches, on the top edge.
description_view_2: The back face is mostly plain gray with a small black corner accent and a subtle seam along the top.
description_view_3: The right side is largely unadorned, with only a faint seam and a small portion of the black border visible at the top.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed rectangular handle, likely plastic or metal, integrated into the top surface for carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two small oval latches on the top edge, likely plastic or metal, with a snap or clasp mechanism.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal compartments are visible; the exterior suggests a single main compartment with a hinged lid.
